meaning: n.沙捞越(马来西亚的一邦)
examples: Another by-election looms in the important state of Sarawak on May 16th.
His fractious opposition is contesting a big state election in Sarawak on April 16th.
Recently, it announced two more connections to Miri (Sarawak) and Tawau (Sabah), which it will operate from September.
Rivers form the main transportation network for hundreds of thousands of people in sprawling Sarawak.
The Sarawak results may make the government hold off on calling an early national election.
